_doc: JARVIS HUD non-GLB assets: Niagara VFX, post FX, sound FX, music, voice. Authored in-engine (UE5 Niagara/MetaSounds) or generated; GLBs live in jarvis_gen_specs.jsonl. Style per docs/JARVIS_VISUAL_LANGUAGE.md.

vfx_niagara.desc: Cyan scanline sweep + ring ignition when a scene boots
Particle data-stream ribbons flowing from sources into an anchor when data hydrates
Radial cyan burst when a hero/module is summoned by voice
Red/amber ripple from the hero + right-stack pulse on critical alert
Slow drifting ambient cyan motes filling the chamber
Volumetric ceiling-ring light shafts onto the black-chrome floor
Amber orbiting particles over an anchor while self-healing scrape runs

music.desc: Low cinematic ambient pad, evolving, non-intrusive; intensifies during alert/confrontation

voice.wire: server/services/voice_tts.py (planned); replaces Web-Speech stopgap in src/lib/jarvisVoice.js
